United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Jeff helps a remote town which has become overwhelmed with feral cats. Plus, a staff member's dog needs emergency surgery and Jeff rushes to save a Chihuahua.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete's build in Washington will fuse action and relaxing. With a bouncy-bridge entryway and a zip-line through the forest, it's a thrill-seekers' haven.

programme.title: Intruders
programme.desc: In Texas, a family battles for its home after their son finds a venomous snake in the toilet. In Florida, a mystery predator targets a family's livestock.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Otto buries a giant water tank to solve water shortage issues. Atz Lee and Atz Sr seek out black bear, and Eivin builds a survival motorbike fitted with weapons.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Book Of...
programme.desc: Featuring in-depth interviews with Gabe Brown. Plus, winter falls and the Browns are building a new home. Working in the snow, they face setbacks that threaten their progress.

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Linda is terrified when her candle shop is flooded by the sound of screeching monkeys and primate-like shadows dance on the walls. What happened here.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Assembling a Florida Gators-themed tank for alumnus, WWE Superstar, former tag-team champion and one half of the Prime-Time Players, Titus O'Neil, to commemorate the 100th episode.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: Two-time MLB World Series champion Johnny Damon and his wife, expecting a child, want the ATM crew to help reveal the gender of their baby at a party by building two different tanks.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and NTS build a tree house for the For-Mar Nature Preserve just outside Flint, Mich.; the 5-platform nature headquarters serves as a positive addition to a community still reeling from the water crisis that began in 2014.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete is back in Texas to build a sophisticated, sleek-and-chic treehouse in the heart of Dallas; Daryl and the NTS team put treehouse engineering to the ultimate test at Washington State University, proving down-to-the-pound the power of the TAB.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: The NTS team leave their tents behind and head to New Jersey to build a campers' retreat for an outdoor-loving couple; with a screened-in porch, floating barbecue deck and cozy hanging bed, this Adirondack style tree-cabin puts glamping in the trees.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete pushes his design skills to create an owl-inspired tree house library in Charlotte, N.C.; evoking the face of the bird and using all sorts of curves, including rounded walls and semicircle bookcases, the crew builds a one-of-a-kind masterpiece.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete treks to New York's Catskill Mountains to build his first glass house in the sky; piecing materials together like a puzzle, Pete uses his clients' collection of 50 vintage windows to construct an elegant tree house encased by walls of glass.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country; Pete creates rustic perfection in six live oak trees with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When the CIA fires Harm, he lands a job flying a crop-duster for a teenage boss; staff discovers Harm's replacement has lied about her credentials.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The admiral buries Harm in backlogged case files; a veteran (Ossie Davis) says a bureaucratic snafu forced him to steal; a submarine picks up a North Korean crew imperiled by a SARS outbreak.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: Margaret must represent Chuck when he faces 20 years in federal prison after being accused of fixing a cash prize giveaway at the Portland Widows hockey game; Lyle finds a new love interest in a forensic accountant.

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: During a murder investigation, the team uncovers a fraudulent charity targeting those looking for missing military personnel; Tony considers adopting a stray cat that followed him home.

programme.title: Scorpion
programme.desc: Team Scorpion is blackmailed into breaking into the United Nations to help with the assassination of an arms dealer; Sylvester tries to protect Megan's wishes.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team races the clock to find a baby kidnapped by a killer, to prevent the child from becoming the next victim.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: When the CIA fires Harm, he lands a job flying a crop-duster for a teenage boss; staff discovers Harm's replacement has lied about her credentials.

programme.title: JAG
programme.desc: The admiral buries Harm in backlogged case files; a veteran (Ossie Davis) says a bureaucratic snafu forced him to steal; a submarine picks up a North Korean crew imperiled by a SARS outbreak.

programme.title: On The Case With Paula Zahn
programme.desc: Police are tasked with unravelling a puzzling mystery after a beloved father and real estate executive is ambushed in his office.

programme.title: The First 48
programme.desc: In New Orleans, a young mother is found shot and burned in the trunk of her car when a night out on the town becomes her last.

programme.title: Green Eyed Killers
programme.desc: A mother is gunned down in a ruthless ambush by her obsessed ex. As her son escapes, a chilling plan unfolds, ending in a life sentence.

programme.title: K9 Pd With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: New. K9 Jax chases a suspect accused of stealing a car, while K9 Timmy is called in to bring a tense standoff to a dramatic end in a high-stakes operation.

programme.title: K9 Pd With Jim Belushi
programme.desc: K9 Igo shuts down a standoff before it explodes, tracking down a suspect in a tense pursuit. In a gripping takedown, the pressure builds until there's nowhere to run.

programme.title: My Strange Arrest
programme.desc: A Florida neighborhood finds itself facing an alarming situation as it becomes the target of shocking deliveries, sparking concern among residents.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: In court, a victim's sister lashes out at the killer. A man appears pantless for his virtual hearing. A mother defends her sister who accidentally killed her son.

programme.title: Crime In Progress
programme.desc: Indiana officers face a tense standoff at a suspected kidnapping scene, while in Colorado a mother's grim discovery sparks a chilling case.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation
programme.desc: Paramedics rush to the aid of a man attacked by his girlfriend with a box-cutter knife; gunshots fired and a man down; first responders plead with a patient to go the hospital before she has another potentially life-threatening seizure.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation
programme.desc: Patrick and Danelle go above and beyond to help a schizophrenic patient; Holly and Chris have a scary run-in with poison control involving a nervous mother; Baton Rouge, La., has a busier than usual night with erratic patients.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Chaos erupts at a high-school football game when shots are fired and a teenager is wounded; Mayville and Stokes investigate multiple bomb threats in the neighborhood of Ybor City; the ROC Squad chases a teen on a joyride with his parents' car.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: New partners Arkady and Tom search for a victim who vanished in a river; a motorcyclist suffers serious injuries in an accident; a pedicab driver hurts his leg; a drug dealer hides out in a dangerous neighborhood.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Titus and Dan assist a woman who was stabbed in the face; Holly and Nick tend to a transgender assault victim; a wild car chase ends with a major accident, firefighters work to put out a structure fire.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: Police and EMS teams in New Orleans deal with armed robberies and shootings on New Year's Eve; Gavin returns to work.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: A chaotic evening finds Tampa first responders treating seizure and overdose patients; suspected armed robbers lead the ROC Squad Task Force in a high-speed chase.

programme.title: Nightwatch
programme.desc: On a night that leaves the EMT crew holding its breath, the first responders aid patients suffering from a strange assortment of afflictions, from being impaled by wood to getting thrown from a moving vehicle.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: Motown legend Marvin Gaye is shot and killed in a family argument; when a doctor's wife falls in the shower, investigators realize that it is not a fatal accident.

programme.title: Corrupt Crimes
programme.desc: Aaron Hernandez goes from the football record books to life in prison for murder; a former stripper is accused in her husband's brutal death.

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: Nobody knew about suburban dad Michael Hendricks' dark sexual fantasies or his dangerous dalliance with Maggie Ybarra. Behind closed doors, Hendricks and Ybarra nurtured a secret relationship that would turn deadly. In her first-ever interview, Ybarra reveals to host David Scott what it was like to fall under the spell of the Devil Next Door - and how their twisted partnership ended with abusive m

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: When flames tore through a Buffalo, New York home in 2018, the investigation revealed a toxic relationship and a hot-tempered arsonist, Frank Bredt, Jr. Now Bredt is talking about his crime from behind bars. In this episode of Interview With a Killer, host David Scott revisits the fire, the evidence, and the unraveling timeline - exposing a jilted lover hidden behind smoke and destruction and givi

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In 2013, the small city of Weatherford, Texas was rocked by the brutal slaying of local son, JD Doss. The murder weapon? A pickaxe. The murderer? His close friend, 24-year-old Nicholas Camfield. In a shocking twist, Camfield not only killed his victim by repeatedly striking him in the head, he also mutilated, scalped, and defiled his body over the course of days. In one of David Scott's most shock

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: In his first ever television interview, killer Thomas Gilbert, Jr. discusses the murder that shook New York's elite. The Princeton-educated Gilbert became a tabloid obsession when he shot his father after his $1,000 allowance was cut off. But in this unique installment of Interview With a Killer, Gilbert appears to be a far cry from his once golden upbringing. Host David Scott explores his long hi

programme.title: Interview With a Killer
programme.desc: She's one of the most camera-friendly killers in true crime history. A glamorous Texas social climber turned convicted black widow. Celeste Beard Johnson has done many television interviews, flashing a smile as she proclaims her innocence and pleads for sympathy. But she's never been questioned by David Scott. And this interview is unlike any that she's ever done. In this special episode of Interv

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: When an art dealer's wife dies in a car crash, questions arise whether it was an accident or a murder.

programme.title: VPI: Vinnie Politan Investigates
programme.desc: Vinnie Politan takes a deep dive into the true-crime stories that are captivating the world over.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: An extremely successful California career woman keeps falling ill and doctors can't determine why, then after she dies they still have no explanation until they find a key figure in her life has been lying about his past.

programme.title: Forensic Files II
programme.desc: The body of a 24-year-old criminology student is found wrapped in a blanket alongside a desolate road in Brooklyn, N.Y.; police discover that the bouncer at a bar is her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In a series of murders near Sacramento, Calif., a killer gags and molests prostitutes, cuts their clothes in random patterns and cuts off their hair; microscopic evidence helps solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the discovery of a skull in the forest near a boy scout camp, police use facial reconstruction to identify the body.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators use obscure evidence to find the person responsible for killing justice officials with mail bombs in the South.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Forensic scientists provide authorities with evidence that a death deemed accidental 20 years ago was actually murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police find fragments of deleted computer files leading them to suspect a woman's suicide is really murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspicious neighbor gives police a break in a cold case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A family suspects their teenage daughter's new friends were involved in her disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 62-year-old man opens a car restoration business and becomes seriously ill, his doctors cannot find the cause, but forensics can; identification of a highly toxic metal in the victim's blood leads to his poisoner.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a 6-year-old disappears, her father becomes the prime suspect; he fails a polygraph test and even confesses, but 10 years later, the investigation gets turned on its head.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Investigators build a makeshift tent around a woman's body and use superglue fumes to lift the killer's palm print from the victim's skin.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The disappearance of a mail-order bride proves suspicious when detectives learn that two of the Texas husband's previous wives had died in mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A jeweler's search through old sales records helps police find likely suspects in the murder of elderly couple Edward Kowalzck and Gertrude Thompson.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A garbage bag leads police to a child's killer.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: When a former Playboy bunny's husband is shot dead at home, the investigation reveals sordid affairs, family infighting and a possible hired hit; the search for the truth ultimately leads to multiple suspects, including some close to home.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: Star Stowe takes the world by storm when she becomes Playmate of the Month, but everything the magazine has to offer seduces Star into a world of abuse and addiction and sends her down a tragic path.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: A 25-year-old Playboy Italia model connects with a 71-year-old doctor after he sees her photos online; he supports her for two years and gives her more than $300,000 before threatening to cut her off, and their relationship takes a deadly turn.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: A 19-year-old is discovered in Canada; after becoming "Playmate of the Year," her husband sees dollar signs, but as her star rises, she's drawn to another man; afraid of losing his meal ticket, her husband shoots them in their home.

programme.title: Toxic
programme.desc: Elizabeth investigates the troubling case of Kate Ranta, a military wife who found herself in an abusive relationship and battling all the systems that protect abusers.

programme.title: A Killer Among Friends
programme.desc: When a middle schooler vanishes without a trace, suspicion quickly falls on the new circle of older friends she's been spending time with; as family and friends dig deeper, secrets unravel, and the line between loyalty and betrayal starts to blur.

programme.title: The Playboy Murders
programme.desc: As a Playboy Bunny, Jackie Hendrickson is forbidden from fraternizing with her customers; Atlanta plastic surgeon Dr. Warren Brown is impossible to resist, and their illicit affair sets off a deadly chain of events.

programme.title: Toxic
programme.desc: Elizabeth digs into convicted conman, Anthony Strangis; after unpacking his MO with Sarma, Elizabeth uncovers a string of alleged new victims; new revelations suggest Anthony Strangis is at it again and put Elizabeth hot on his trail.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: I Have To Do The Right Thing. When Tim Kreider discovered his son, Alec, committed a heinous crime, he knew he had to turn him in. But, how far will a father go to protect his son.

programme.title: Still A Mystery
programme.desc: A young woman acts erratically at a restaurant and police take her into custody. They release her in the middle of the night - and she disappears.

programme.title: Still A Mystery
programme.desc: A bride-to-be vanishes weeks before her wedding. Suspicion swirls around her fiancé and ex-boyfriend before investigators switch focus to a co-worker.

programme.title: The Real Murders On Elm Street
programme.desc: The day before Christmas Eve, police find two women bound and suffocated. Their Elm Street empire hides a killer closer than they think.

programme.title: Spooked Scotland
programme.desc: The crew visit Bannockburn House, a haunted 17th Century mansion. They use one-of-a-kind equipment to interact with the ghost of Bonnie Prince Charles.

programme.title: Portals To Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Katrina attempt to calm restless spirits at the historic Taylor Trask Museum in Massachusetts. Reports say spirits have been throwing TVs across rooms.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: Pam Jacobs reveals the dark truth about her father. Growing up, she never realised he was a fugitive suspected of the murders of various coin shop owners.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here
programme.desc: I Have To Do The Right Thing. When Tim Kreider discovered his son, Alec, committed a heinous crime, he knew he had to turn him in. But, how far will a father go to protect his son.

programme.title: Still A Mystery
programme.desc: A young woman acts erratically at a restaurant and police take her into custody. They release her in the middle of the night - and she disappears.

programme.title: Still A Mystery
programme.desc: A bride-to-be vanishes weeks before her wedding. Suspicion swirls around her fiancé and ex-boyfriend before investigators switch focus to a co-worker.

programme.title: The Real Murders On Elm Street
programme.desc: The day before Christmas Eve, police find two women bound and suffocated. Their Elm Street empire hides a killer closer than they think.

programme.title: Spooked Scotland
programme.desc: The crew visit Bannockburn House, a haunted 17th Century mansion. They use one-of-a-kind equipment to interact with the ghost of Bonnie Prince Charles.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Okla., the townspeople experience heartbreak when their esteemed sheriff is gunned down in the night; as the community wrestles with its safety, law enforcement personnel are determined to find justice for their fellow officer.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Beloved wife and cardiac nurse Lorie Kirkley goes missing from the safety of her home in what appears to be a burglary gone wrong; several strange clues are found.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Joy Dishneau plans on becoming a small business owner in the Ozarks, but she is found murdered in her own shop, and all of her employees become suspects.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Bride-to-be Patricia Richmond is found bound and murdered at her future in-laws' home in the resort town of Steamboat Springs, Colo.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After locals smell charred meat, police find burned remains in an abandoned mining pit in the town of Hibbing, Minn.; before they can investigate who committed the crime, they must first identity the body.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: The town of Higginson only has two full-time police officers, and one is gunned down while on duty.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: Mindy Morgenstern, a college student and waitress, is found strangled and stabbed in her own apartment; family, friends and the entire town of Valley City, N.D., help law enforcement identify the monster who committed this violent crime.

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: In Madison, Wis., Andrew Nesbitt is found murdered on his 46th birthday; with no witnesses, investigators turn to surveillance cameras in bars and taxi cabs and on street corners to track down his killer.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: On the Time Bandit, crew conflict in winter weather puts Johnathan's leadership to the test; Sig and Mandy risk a heavy fine chasing the biomass along a boundary line; Jake struggles with managing an injury-prone crew member.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: Sig returns from his mother's funeral only to find his gear in harm's way; Rick and Keith forge a beneficial partnership; Jack makes his first offload as captain; The Coast Guard gets a call to extract a sailor with broken legs 200 miles out to sea.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: With a storm threatening his record-breaking run, Johnathan allies with Keith to triangulate the crab; Jack braves treacherous tidal currents, staking his redemption on loaded pots; in 30-foot waves, chaos strikes the Wizard.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: With $1 million in crab at stake, the Wizard battles unrelenting 30-footers; Jake faces a devil's bargain to aid another captain, but the high road may come at a cost; Sig fights to eke out a profit; the Kodiak crew assesses the damage.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: On the Time Bandit, crew conflict in winter weather puts Johnathan's leadership to the test; Sig and Mandy risk a heavy fine chasing the biomass along a boundary line; Jake struggles with managing an injury-prone crew member.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: When Sig's crane blows a hydraulic line, Clark ascends the rig in 20-foot seas for a critical repair; the Cornelia Marie crew battles a fire as Jake's engine room fills with smoke; Monte fights a generator outage while Rick dumps pots to avoid capsizing.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen
programme.desc: After an all-hands push to Devil's Chute, Jared and his crew build a big convoy, starting a 20-mile climb to the final logging grounds; with float camp on the move and a coastal storm closing in, this haul could make or break their season.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch
programme.desc: With no port for shelter, Johnathan fights to protect his crew as Typhoon Halong pounds the northern grounds; Rick's Red King jackpot halts when a line fouls his prop; in 25-foot seas, Jake discovers the limits of the Cornelia Marie's fishing operations.

programme.title: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Don Wildman examines the purported diaries of Adolf Hitler, a weather disaster that led to the invention of the bicycle and a biblical story.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Some of the brightest minds and theorists on the planet explore the limits of human knowledge and explain the science behind the rules of the universe.

programme.title: World's Toughest Expeditions with James Cracknell
programme.desc: James goes to Southern Africa to follow in the footsteps of Dr David Livingstone. He faces some of Africa's most dangerous animals.

programme.title: Legendary Locations
programme.desc: Josh shares five locations where the natural and supernatural worlds can be explored. They include a haunted asylum in NY, and a cathedral built entirely of salt.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they keep you comfortable, entertained and safe with the latest aircraft seats? And, how do they design bras with aerospace technology to give you that extra lift.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How is plasterboard made from power station smoke? How do they cast the world's top awards? How do they build a plane that can take off and land almost anywhere.

programme.title: Combat Dealers
programme.desc: Charismatic Bruce Crompton and his team, buy, repair and sell World War II military gear, travelling the world in search of rare artefacts to restore and sell.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they make car windows to keep out wind and rain, stones and thieves, and even noise and harmful UV rays? And, how do they put the gloss on lipstick.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they make the favourite sweet of the Ottomans, James Bond's gyroplane and the Supercat- the world's fastest ferry.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they carve longboards, turn millions of lemons into juice, and build industry's versatile heavy lifter, the forklift truck.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they roast the coffee that wakes up Italy, bake the bricks that build America, and blast diamonds from a frozen volcano.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they take the world's sharpest photos, stitch an airbag to catch a falling car, and produce billions of perfectly-formed jelly beans.

programme.title: How Do They Do It?
programme.desc: How do they build a caravan, forge tuning forks, resurface an ice rink, and put on the world's biggest light festival.

programme.title: Mummies Unwrapped
programme.desc: A missing mummy could re-write the history of Abraham Lincoln's assassination. Ramy Romany investigates whether John Wilkes Booth actually escaped.

programme.title: Secrets Underground
programme.desc: Rob Nelson investigates the mysterious rocks at the bottom of Lake Michigan known as Underwater Stonehenge. Plus, the search for escape tunnels in Alcatraz.

programme.title: Cooper's Treasure
programme.desc: Following the Columbus trail, bad weather strikes and Darrell dives past the limits of his gear into extreme danger. Plus, a huge discovery changes everything.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour
programme.desc: Australia. Mike and Elvis engage in the ultimate Aussie showdown: Ford versus Holden. Can their Ford XR8 outpace the Holden GTS at the Mount Panorama circuit.

programme.title: Shed And Buried
programme.desc: In North Yorkshire, Sam and Henry examine an incredible collection of classic American motors. However, the guys are most interested in a rusty Mini.

programme.title: Shed And Buried
programme.desc: Henry and Sam look around a shed full of vintage motorcycles and intriguing memorabilia. The guys see potential in a Yamaha RD350, but can they afford it.

programme.title: Iron Resurrection
programme.desc: The owner of the '36 Ford Coupe finally gets to drive her family heirloom. And a couple returns with a '67 Chevelle to add even more horsepower.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: A 30-truck charity hay convoy delivers supplies to drought-stricken King Island. Rookie Harrison Hooper tackles his toughest challenge yet.

programme.title: The Explosion Show
programme.desc: Tory Belleci and Streetbike Tommy meet experts of the battlefield who recreate black powder blasts from the Civil War and experiment with this deadly explosive.

programme.title: Shed And Buried: Classic Cars
programme.desc: Henry and Fuzz stop by a shed in Leighton Buzzard filled with astonishing American muscle cars. The pair pick a trusty classic with room for a profit.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Exploring the stories of the planet's fantastic beings.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike indulges himself restoring his very first car, a 1961 Sunbeam; Avery buys an army truck, and recruits Mike to help him bring it home; tempers flare when Avery confronts Mike about the bottom line.

programme.title: Lost Car Rescue
programme.desc: As if the car hunt wasn't tough enough, Matt and his team head East to search for classic pickup trucks in unfamiliar territory.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Bizarre, mysterious tales ran rampant and are still being told to this day; are these strange tales of the American frontier simply legend, or was the west far stranger than one could possibly imagine?

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye refuses to release a wounded Korean wanted by U.S. Intelligence.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A celebrated general dies in Margaret's quarters, and his aide glorifies the circumstances.

programme.title: The UnBelievable With Dan Aykroyd
programme.desc: Exploring the stories of the planet's fantastic beings.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Does the Devil really exist? Tony Harris separates fact from fiction as he investigates photos, videos and sounds that allegedly have a link to Satan; are recordings of an exorcism proof that demonic possession is real?

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: Bizarre, mysterious tales ran rampant and are still being told to this day; are these strange tales of the American frontier simply legend, or was the west far stranger than one could possibly imagine?

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: An underdog breaks the mold by creating instant photography, revolutionizing how we take photos; and it kicks off a war of innovation between two iconic companies battling to be the number one camera brand in the country.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As a drastic drop in water levels scrambles the swamp, Mr. Daniel challenges Zak to haul in an unheard-of 100 feet of gator; Bruce and Anna flee crushing boat traffic and wind up deep in a remote slough; battling through a marsh full of tiny lizards, Ronnie and Timmy make a radical mid-day change; Jacob and Little Willie chase the legendary "Crocogator"; Troy's solo grind forces him to call in Cha

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: After a new Bobby Dazzler is unearthed on Lot five, the Oak Island team makes a discovery with possible religious implications.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: After verifying a recent find on Lot 5 to be a sacred, religious artifact, the team drills through a surprising discovery deep in the Money Pit area.

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: Troy and Tes gamble on new hunting grounds; Ashley and Kaylyn follow an old surveyor's trail; Zak and Aaron place their bets on Bad Luck Prairie; Dusty resurrects an old boat to reach distant honey holes.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands That Built America
programme.desc: An underdog breaks the mold by creating instant photography, revolutionizing how we take photos; and it kicks off a war of innovation between two iconic companies battling to be the number one camera brand in the country.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Rick, Corey, and Chum are making big deals in the smallest state; in Providence, R.I., the guys cruise over to a muscle car collection, check out a rare book written by John Adams, and take aim at a harpoon gun.

programme.title: Swamp People
programme.desc: As a drastic drop in water levels scrambles the swamp, Mr. Daniel challenges Zak to haul in an unheard-of 100 feet of gator; Bruce and Anna flee crushing boat traffic and wind up deep in a remote slough; battling through a marsh full of tiny lizards, Ronnie and Timmy make a radical mid-day change; Jacob and Little Willie chase the legendary "Crocogator"; Troy's solo grind forces him to call in Cha

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: In Alabama, Robbie and Jersey go hog wild for Edd's classic car collection and bad-to-the-bone boneyard but he's reluctant to let anything go.

programme.title: Forged In Fire
programme.desc: Four smiths must forge signature blades from the metal found in household items, before two smiths recreate one of history's most iconic sabres.

programme.title: Secrets Of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Dan Jones explores the history of Cardiff castle over more than 2,000 years and reveals how it transformed into a lavish Victorian home. (2 of.

programme.title: Royal B**tards: Rise of the Tudors
programme.desc: When Edward IV dies unexpectedly, the future of England is thrown up in the air. Richard III makes a power grab, and Margaret makes her own power move. Strong language/violence. (3 of.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens 18
programme.desc: Giorgio Tsoukalos explores archive UFO hotspots worldwide. Could these mysterious locations hold proof of extraterrestrial life.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens 17
programme.desc: Throughout the ancient world, there are depictions of mysterious figures that appear to be half-human and half-bird.

programme.title: Ghost Ships
programme.desc: For decades, residents in Nova Scotia have reported munitions washing up on their shores - believed to have come from the wreck of the SS Clare Lilley.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: A look at the crimes of Myra Hindley and Ian Brady, featuring interviews with the family of Keith Bennett, who are still campaigning to find his body.

programme.title: Hitler's Engineers
programme.desc: The designer of one of the most popular car brands in history, Ferdinand Porsche would not have seen his success without the support of Adolf Hitler.

programme.title: Alien Corridors
programme.desc: With all the activity that's been recorded here, Sedona seemingly doubles as an intergalactic airport - but what is drawing UFOs to this spot.

programme.title: Evidence Of The Unexplained
programme.desc: Thousands of UFO sightings and abductions are reported every year. This series examines these accounts and casts new light on historic cases.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A British woman in the 20th century stunned Egyptologists by accurately locating structures and artefacts. Perhaps she had an otherworldly agenda.

programme.title: William Shatner's Weird or What?
programme.desc: An octopus correctly selects winning teams in a soccer tournament; dogs leap off a Scottish bridge to their deaths; a lost cat makes a cross-country journey.

programme.title: Defending Europe
programme.desc: The ingenious fortress designs used to defend France.

programme.title: Defending Europe
programme.desc: Spain's impressive fortifications in a dramatic history of conflict.

programme.title: The Hidden Holocaust
programme.desc: Interviews and rare footage document the 1915 Turkish slaughter of Armenians.

programme.title: Erased: WW2's Heroes of Color
programme.desc: Force K6, an Indian regiment of mule handlers in WW2, aided Allied evacuation at Dunkirk, other units escaped Nazi-occupied France.

programme.title: Erased: WW2's Heroes of Color
programme.desc: The stories of three Black sailors, who not only miraculously survived the attack on Pearl Harbor, but also saved countless lives.

programme.title: Erased: WW2's Heroes of Color
programme.desc: Unearthing the hidden heroes of the 320th Barrage Balloon Battalion, the only all-Black combat unit to fight on the D-Day beaches to help liberate Europe.

programme.title: Erased: WW2's Heroes of Color
programme.desc: The Black Panthers, an elite tank unit, push back Hitler's final advance.

programme.title: Extreme China
programme.desc: Cave Diving in an Underwater World - Du'an: Adrenaline junkie Jin Xiao and fearless cave diver Han Ting explore one of China's biggest underwater cave systems in Du'an.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: After losing both engines in a storm, the pilots of Garuda Indonesia Flight 421 performed one of the most remarkable emergency landings ever. (S15, ep 8) 7+.

programme.title: World War II: The Apocalypse
programme.desc: Previously unseen footage reveals how, as Nazi soldiers enjoy rest and recreation in Paris, Jews and Polish prisoners are forced into slave labour.

programme.title: World War II: The Apocalypse
programme.desc: New footage reveals the conflict raging in Asia, Stalingrad and Egypt. While in Europe, the darkest days of the war approach as the Nazis instigate The Final Solution.

programme.title: Mega Marine Machines
programme.desc: A fire-scarred freighter begins its final journey to a Lake Erie yard, where crews race to dismantle it, using high-risk methods to turn a profit. (S1, ep 1) 7+.

programme.title: Air Crash Investigation
programme.desc: When two float planes carrying tourists collide near a spectacular Alaskan waterfall, investigators turn to 3D technology to figure out why. (5 of 10) 7+.

programme.title: Yukon Vet
programme.desc: Dr Oakley comes to the aid of a donkey in need of an attitude adjustment, and a male caribou with a life-threatening leg infection.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Zoo: Columbus
programme.desc: There's drama behind the scenes at The Columbus Zoo and Aquarium as a cheetah goes under the knife. Plus, twin polar bear cubs jump in at the deep end.

programme.title: Killer Safari
programme.desc: A cheetah disappears underwater in seconds. A crocodile faces down ten lion and a buffalo plays tug-of-war with a crocodile's nose and loses.

programme.title: Gorongosa: Paradise Reborn
programme.desc: Follow an elephant's journey as she witnesses Gorongosa National Park transform from 'Africa's Eden' to a devastated warzone and then to the site of a huge wildlife restoration project. 7+.

programme.title: Northwoods Survival
programme.desc: Spring has arrived and Margot searches for a bear, Billy upgrades the cabin, Matty makes a backwoods deep freeze and Emilie and Gilbert work on a 'Shabotwan'.

programme.title: Ultimate Airport Dubai
programme.desc: Customs officers catch a smuggler hiding 2,000 bottles of illegal prescription medication. A ground dispatcher races to prepare a cash shipment of $20 million. (S3, ep 10) 7+.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Alaska Natives battle the seas of the arctic as winter looms.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: First Alaskans
programme.desc: Alaska Natives battle the seas of the arctic as winter looms.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: The final days of winter force Alaskans to push through the cold.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: The Arctic spring in Alaska comes with hard work, new resources, and new dangers.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: The arctic spring season brings open waters, awakened animals, and key opportunities.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Alaskans venture into the open landscape to seize the warming temperatures of spring.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: Alaskans utilize the sun-drenched days of summer to learn valuable lessons of survival.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: With Alaska in bloom, residents of the Arctic must seize the endless daylight.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: Sculpted by the elements, Grand Canyon National Park is a high-rise haven and a natural wonder; at every elevation, the park's wild inhabitants carve out a niche that gives them an edge.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: Biscayne National Park -- an ocean paradise protecting us from the storm.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: A hidden gem full of secrets and surprises, tucked away in a corner of Minnesota; experience its wildlife and stunning beauty from the icy grips of winter to the height of summer blooms.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: From snaking rivers to windswept mountains, explore the iconic, wild wonder of the West.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: A look at Channel Islands' unique landscapes and wildlife, revealing an older version of California.

programme.title: America's National Parks
programme.desc: A look at Lake Clark, a hidden gem where animals and people coexist in harmony.

programme.title: National Parks: USA: New Beginnings
programme.desc: From bear cubs to bison calves and fox kits, life blossoms in National Parks.

programme.title: Disney Celebrates America: The Pursuit of Happiness
programme.desc: A coast-to-coast event exploring Disney Parks and attractions as a portal through which America's greatest stories, triumphs and traditions are celebrated.

programme.title: North American Whitetail
programme.desc: Whitetail deer hunts.

programme.title: Drury's Thirteen
programme.desc: Catch-A-Dream hunter Will Campbell joins Mark Drury in Iowa for Phase One, while Phase Two opens with Mark harvesting a mature Missouri 9-point.

programme.title: Hunt Masters
programme.desc: Jake Mancl of HHA Sports joins IL hunt camp and the stage is set for a classic Midwest whitetail pursuit with the NYTRX bow sight.

programme.title: Drop Zone
programme.desc: Greg Zipadelli heads to Florida to hunt alligators with rod and reel alongside Hal Shaffer and the team at Gods Country Outfitters.

programme.title: Sporting Classics With Chris Dorsey
programme.desc: It is the big game hunt of a lifetime for Chris Dorsey, as he travels north in pursuit of the epic polar bear.

programme.title: Bowlife
programme.desc: Levi is in Nebraska trying to close the chapter on a 3-year chase with a buck he calls daggers.

programme.title: Heartland Bowhunter
programme.desc: Mike's first ever black bear hunt in the Mecca of Saskatchewan.

programme.title: Whitetail Freaks
programme.desc: The Whitetail Freaks review the amazing success of the 2025 hunting season and look forward to this year.

programme.title: Driven With Pat & Nicole
programme.desc: Opening day of youth rifle season is here, and the Reeves are back in Kansas.

programme.title: Bone Collector
programme.desc: September means Elk Season! Also known as Wapiti. Michael Waddell is in Utah for the first elk camp of the season with Blake Shelton, Eric Dunn, and Jeremy Eldredge.

programme.title: Buck Commander
programme.desc: A group of former and current professional baseball players, along with a pair of country music stars, team up with outdoorsman, hunter and author Willie Robertson. Best known for his appearances on A&E's "Duck Dynasty," Robertson aids his co-owners of the Buck Commander Co. in the woods for deer season. Forming a bond and sharing a few laughs, Adam LaRoche, Ryan Langerhans, Tombo Martin, Luke Bry

programme.title: Headhunters TV
programme.desc: Randy kicks the season off in North Dakota and meets up with the rest of the crew at Powder River Outfitters in Montana.

programme.title: Renovation Hunters
programme.desc: Renovation Hunters remembers the highlights of the last 4 years and shares exciting things to come.

programme.title: Nick's Wild Ride With Nick Hoffman
programme.desc: After a tough deer season, Nick visits a friend at Western Kentucky University who helps him find unexpected luck on and off the field.

programme.title: Dropped: Arctic Drift
programme.desc: With 24 hours remaining and 20 miles to the extraction point, a massive blizzard moves into the Brooks Range forcing Chris and Casey to make some tough decisions in order to make it out of the Brooks Range safely.

programme.title: Prairie Pursuit
programme.desc: Greg takes the family to the Canadian West Coast island of Haida Gwaii for everyone's very first ocean adventure.

programme.title: CCFR Radio: On the Air
programme.desc: Rod Giltaca from the Canadian Coalition for Firearm Rights (CCFR) and guests explore firearm-related topics and rights in a current events show.

programme.title: The Edge
programme.desc: After a successful mountain caribou hunt, Joe Eppeles' remote fly-in adventure continues; pursuing stone sheep and goats in extreme heat, Joe and Kyle push into new terrain until a final opportunity changes everything.

programme.title: My Best Hunt with Rod Giltaca
programme.desc: Skyler Johnston returns to share an incredible solo Mulie hunt with Rod.

programme.title: Outdoor Quest
programme.desc: Hunting muskox and fishing for giant lake trout at Aylmer Lake.

programme.title: Dream Makers
programme.desc: On this episode, we are doing a compilation of the best hunts from our last season as we meet up with a bunch of recipients going on a variety of hunts.

programme.title: Americana Outdoors
programme.desc: Adventures filmed in many of the best fishing and hunting destinations in North America.

programme.title: Deer & Deer Hunting
programme.desc: Joining Daniel Schmidt and Mark Kayser as they break down the critical mechanics of shot placement, ensuring quick, ethical kills on your next big-game hunt.

programme.title: The Outdoorsman With Max McNeely
programme.desc: Max and his brother Rex head to the natural state Arkansas; there they visit a fish hatchery and go fly fishing on the White River.

programme.title: The Wild Grill TV
programme.desc: Lindsay prepares venison tenderloin with roasted vegetables.

programme.title: Forever Wild Outdoors Adrenaline Adventures
programme.desc: This season kicks off with one of our favorite hunts — Youth Turkey Season at Deerassic in Cambridge, Ohio. Follow along as young hunters take to the spring woods in pursuit of unforgettable memories and their first longbeards.

programme.title: The RVers
programme.desc: Popular hosts Tom and Cait share their RV origin story, which might just be a relatively common one. Next, entrepreneurs Heath and Alyssa show how they've built businesses -- and a family -- while RVing.

programme.title: Huntech Pro
programme.desc: Season 6 kicks off near Vivo with a powerful family-driven meat hunt in Limpopo. This episode is all about family, firsts, and the true purpose of hunting—putting meat on the table and creating unforgettable memories in the African bush.

programme.title: The One
programme.desc: Mike and his family are packing their bags and heading to Africa.

programme.title: Hell Below
programme.desc: A US sub shows unbelievable courage in the face of impossible odds. A look into how a bomb dropped by the Japanese forces pushes the craft into a deadly dive, and ignites a toxic chemical fire that leaves the crew fighting for their lives.

programme.title: Scanning History
programme.desc: The first great empire of the Akkadians, led by Sargon the Great, dominated the Fertile Crescent, replacing the Sumerians and extending its influence as far north as Syria and south as Oman.

programme.title: Buried Evidence
programme.desc: Open burial sites filled with secrets. Find powerful artifacts in a French rulers tomb, see what a tomb adorned with conch shells says about sacred ceremonies, and expose complex beliefs about animals and the afterlife in an Egyptian zoo graveyard.

programme.title: History Unsolved: The Investigation Files
programme.desc: Question whether Napoleon Bonaparte was poisoned in exile, then find out whose bones were buried underneath Benjamin Franklin's London home; analyze evidence that suggests that Grand Duchess Anastasia may have escaped the 1918 Romanov massacre.

programme.title: Scanning History
programme.desc: The first great empire of the Akkadians, led by Sargon the Great, dominated the Fertile Crescent, replacing the Sumerians and extending its influence as far north as Syria and south as Oman.

programme.title: Buried Evidence
programme.desc: Open burial sites filled with secrets. Find powerful artifacts in a French rulers tomb, see what a tomb adorned with conch shells says about sacred ceremonies, and expose complex beliefs about animals and the afterlife in an Egyptian zoo graveyard.

programme.title: History Unsolved: The Investigation Files
programme.desc: Question whether Napoleon Bonaparte was poisoned in exile, then find out whose bones were buried underneath Benjamin Franklin's London home; analyze evidence that suggests that Grand Duchess Anastasia may have escaped the 1918 Romanov massacre.

programme.title: How the Nazis Lost the War
programme.desc: In pursuit of their Aryan dream, the Nazis were encumbered by an ideological war from within that would undermine their ability to succeed in World War II.

programme.title: WWII Battles in Color
programme.desc: Rare archive footage charts the German Army in 1940 as it unleashes a new Blitzkrieg tactic.

programme.title: WWII Battles in Color
programme.desc: Cameras roll as Nazi Germany launches an all-out assault on the Soviet Union.

programme.title: WWII Battles in Color
programme.desc: Footage of life and death on the battlefield of El Alamein and behind the lines in the African desert.

programme.title: WWII's Most Daring Raids
programme.desc: British Commandos raid two occupied Norwegian islands to wipe out fish oil factories used to make explosives.

programme.title: WWII Battles in Color
programme.desc: The story of the greatest tank battle the world has ever seen.

programme.title: WWII Battles in Color
programme.desc: Eyewitness accounts from those who fought in the US military's bloodiest battle on the European front in World War II.

programme.title: Battle of Midway: The True Story
programme.desc: America's first victory in the Pacific during World War II is retold from the vantage point of the three U.S. attack planes as they overcame the enemy ambush to face off against the Mitsubishi A6M Zero, a long-range fighter, in the air.

programme.title: The Battle of Normandy: 85 Days in Hell
programme.desc: On D-Day, Allied forces land in Normandy, France, to beat back the German troops and liberate France; previously unseen archival footage captures the 85-day struggle to liberate Europe and includes rare images of the battle itself.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy investigate a Louisiana woman's claims that a vicious supernatural entity killed her father and is wreaking havoc on her family; during her walk, Amy encounters a vindictive dead man and a powerful entity that consumes personalities.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Alabama to help a family being torn apart by menacing entities hellbent on destroying their home and business; during her walk, Amy encounters a vicious group of dead men and a powerful shadow man who torments the living.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Toledo, Ohio, where a family faces a daily onslaught of aggressive paranormal activity; Steve uncovers a grisly string of murders committed near the property, while Amy encounters a twisted spirit intent on harming the living.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Upper Darby, Pa., where a woman claims the dead are attacking her three children, and with the activity getting more dangerous by the day, she's worried someone is going to die.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Wakefield, Mass., where a young mother fears a gateway to the afterlife has brought unwanted guests into her grandmother's home; with the activity getting worse by the day, it's only a matter of time before someone is hurt.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Indianapolis where a couple claims dark forces are wreaking havoc on their lives; they fear the house intends to kill them to prevent them from providing a safe and loving home to their two young granddaughters.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Steve and Amy travel to Iowa, where a woman claims evil forces are tearing her family apart.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Amy and Steve travel to Springfield, Ohio, where a man claims a malicious spirit is threatening to destroy his home, his health and his marriage; he fears for his life and that of his wife if the escalating paranormal activity is not stopped.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young woman is on the hunt for her first home in the suburbs of her native Detroit; she wants it to have lots of vintage charm, but it also has to be totally updated and move-in ready; she brings a friend along to help make inevitable compromises.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple who just completed a massive renovation on a beach house in Naples, Fla., decides to look for a place farther from the beach with more land; she desperately wants another fixer to put her stamp on, but he's done with renovations.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A buyer is looking to buy a weekend place in Guerneville, Calif.; she has her heart set on a vintage cabin close to town, but her touring partner thinks she needs a newer, lower-maintenance place.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A young couple is buying a home in the Washington, D.C., area, but while she's eager to take on a fixer-upper near the city, he's open to going out a little farther to get a turnkey place with a big yard and a garage for woodworking.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple in Knoxville, Tenn., looks for a larger home to grow the family; he likes living in the country and wants a new home with a rural setting, but she's tired of having snakes and opossums as neighbors and wants a change.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A sailor brings his girlfriend on his house hunt in Maui, Hawaii; for him, rental potential and proximity to the beach are key to his low-stress lifestyle, but she's trying to convince him to buy farther up the mountain due to her fear of tsunamis.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A couple searches for a vacation home on the Jersey Shore, but while one wants a lagoon-front home, the other wants to stick to the budget.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: After saving for years for their family vacation home, they search for a place on the shores of South Padre Island.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A man wants to give his daughter the beachfront lifestyle he had as a child, and searches for a waterfront home in Narragansett Bay.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A woman turns her favorite vacation spot, Fripp Island, S.C., into a permanent home for herself and her daughters.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: A couple searches for a vacation home in North Carolina, and while one wants a stand-alone home, the other pushes for a beachfront condo.

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Avid snorkelers who enjoy Half Moon Bay in Akumal, Mexico, would like to buy a condo without exhausting their budget.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A mother and her twin daughters move from landlocked Lakeland, Fla., to the island of Little Gasparilla, Fla.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A family prepares to move from Tacoma to Vashon Island, Wash., because of its eccentric reputation and seemingly untouched setting.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple search for a house on Fidalgo Island, Wash., where their boys can have positive experiences.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: The story of the first time a human tamed a wild horse and the impacts it made on history.

programme.title: The Climate Baby Dilemma
programme.desc: For a growing number of young people, the climate crisis is affecting decisions about whether to have kids.

programme.title: The Pretendians
programme.desc: Anishinaabe author Drew H. Taylor investigates how and why Indigenous identity, culture and art are being appropriated.

programme.title: The Spoils
programme.desc: The exhibition in honor of Jewish art dealer Max Stern at the Düsseldorf City Museum was due to open in 2018, but has been delayed by three years due to discussions over the restitution of artworks looted by the Nazis.

programme.title: The Nature of Things
programme.desc: The story of the first time a human tamed a wild horse and the impacts it made on history.

programme.title: The Climate Baby Dilemma
programme.desc: For a growing number of young people, the climate crisis is affecting decisions about whether to have kids.

programme.title: The Pretendians
programme.desc: Anishinaabe author Drew H. Taylor investigates how and why Indigenous identity, culture and art are being appropriated.

programme.title: Hill
programme.desc: A profile of ex-Formula One driver Damon Hill, revealing how he overcame the adversity of losing his father Graham to follow in his footsteps and become world champion himself.

programme.title: My Icon: Martin Offiah
programme.desc: The former rugby league superstar discusses the individuals that have inspired him in his life and career.

programme.title: Becoming Madonna
programme.desc: Documentary charting the singer's rise to stardom, built around a cache of recently uncovered audio tapes in which a young Madonna reflects on her extraordinary life and career. Plus, rare footage, unseen photos and interviews with family, friends and collaborators.

programme.title: Ferrari: Race to Immortality
programme.desc: Formula One documentary chronicling the early years of the Scuderia Ferrari racing team, founded by the legendary Enzo Ferrari.

programme.title: I Am Heath Ledger
programme.desc: Naomi Watts, Ben Mendelsohn, Ang Lee are among the contributors to a documentary celebrating the life and work of the Australian actor, who died in 2008.

programme.title: Leopard Dynasty: The Rise of Rana
programme.desc: Following a young leopard Prince Rana as he fights to secure his place in Jhalana's territory, even if it means facing off against his own father Bahadur.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Alison collects 10 stump-tailed macaques being retired from a research facility in Edinburgh. The journey is potentially dangerous as the stumpies have never been outside before and some of them are old and frail. Back at the park, staff are anxious as chimp Athena undergoes an eye operation, while squirrel monkey Fidget is a hit with the ladies.

programme.title: Monkey Life
programme.desc: Staff prepare for the arrival of two new woolly monkeys from Switzerland, but they are worried how the animals will cope with the long journey - and how they will fit in once they get here. The male capuchins are put to the test with a clever puzzle feeder and the female stump-tailed macaques vie for superiority.

programme.title: Malawi Wildlife Rescue
programme.desc: The team prepares to release two servals, but things go awry when one vanishes into Malawi's dangerous capital. Plus, a monkey arrives in a critical condition.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Vet Tim soothes a possum's burnt feet and cameras shadow vet Karina as she examines a half-drowned platypus, before referring him to a specialist.

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: In 2020, Australia went up in flames. The scale and intensity signified an undeniable new phase in the global climate crisis. For Australia's wildlife, who have adapted to severities of weather, it was cataclysmic. And for those who did survive, the real challenge only now begins. This documentary examines the toll, the recovery and the healing of the wild after Australia's wildfires.

programme.title: Africa's Hunters
programme.desc: A young lion who was rejected by its mother has grown to maturity, but now faces a series of fresh challenges.

programme.title: America's Wild Seasons
programme.desc: As plunging temperatures bring nature into winter, some animals flee south to find milder climes. But others are determined to tough out the brutal cold.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: In Texas, Dan and Emily find a waterfront home on Cedar Creek Lake that has tons of potential but needs a lot of work.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, R.I., but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into structural issues.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: A man enlists the team to make his tiny cabin on the water more comfortable; he wants to restore a vintage sink and honor his late friend, who was an electrician; when a storm threatens the build at the end, the crew must find a way to finish safely.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: In Industry, Maine, Chase Morrill and his team of builders take on a cabin that hasn't been touched since the 1970s; they find out that 40 years of Maine winters have not been kind to this cabin, and issues begin to arise once the snow melts.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: The crew takes on a tiny cabin with a big problem. The family loves their lakefront camp, but they're desperate for more sleeping space. Rotten beams threaten their loft plans as they rush to beat winter weather.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase Morrill and his team help a homeowner renovate a lake house with children in mind; with a budget of $30,000, the crew members are going to have to use their imaginations to impress their young clients.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase gets a call from retired U.S. Army Staff Sgt. Travis Mills, who is building a retreat to help combat-injured veterans and their families; the builders must turn a cottage into an ADA-compliant event center for veterans and their families.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Meet the Cannons -- they need a new roof, additional sleeping space and, most importantly, higher ceilings; the Cabin Masters transport a very heavy stone hearth, Jedi and Ashley race to assemble a set of stools, and the guys prank Ashley.
